author: Marvel YouTube
text:
Marvel Animation’s X-Men ‘97 Season 2 | Roll Call
“Whatever forces await, we shall face them together.”

Meet the mutants of Marvel Animation’s #XMen97 Season 2, streaming July 1 only on @disneyplus
